TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Evo Morales = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 10 jiyax 26 ka Evo Morales ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bolivia ta sayang o kiya ka Evo Morales, pnaah hngkawas 2006 idas 1 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Soto = Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa kngkawas 2005 cida u wada mangal 53.7ÔľÖ hyo mbiyax mangal Soto Bolivia, mniq kngkawas 2006 idas 1 diyx 22 psdhuwan phiyu Soto, kndadax qnlhangan dha ptalax qnlhangan Spain dhuq cida mwaya balay tu1 Sediq Tnpusu na mpdudul niya, kiya uri u Bolivia tu1 Tuiwil Palic na Soto. Mniq niyi cida han u Bolivia na seyji mi keyjay pa ida wisu qlhangun bhuway sediq Spain na llutuc mi ayjoku Sediq Tnpusu mi sediq Oco ka dmuwi biyax, kiya mi Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa uka dara Oco mi mndungus bay Sediq Tnpusu ka hiya. Juan Evo Morales Ayma u snpeyyah Tuhunac Meyco India Sediq Tnpusu na sediq Aymara ka hiya, Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa pllukus konghu mi lukus Sediq Tnpusu ka hiya, ini plukus seybiro tumal kkluwanan pnsliyan seyji ka hiya. Snpeyyah kngkawas 2009 wada sbrahun ka keyngpo daw, Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa wada mangal 64.2% hto lmutuc Soto dungan. Qmpah Soto cida ka Juan Evo Morales Ayma u pkrana pnluban dha Cyokoku, mniq kngkawas 2006 idas 1 diyax 8 dhuq idas 1 diyax 9 mi kngkawas 2011 idas 8 diyax 10 dhuq idas 8 diyax 13 mi kngkawas 2018 idas 6 diyax 18 dhuq diyax 19 mn3 homung Cyokoku, kiya u mniq kngkawas 2011 idas 8 diyax 11 mangal bnuway Pyasan Tubeyhing Cokoku Jnmin Minggi Hakasey Sweywey. Kngkawas 2013 idas 7 diyax 2 cida, snturung Seymung Ppanan Skoki Soto Bolivia Pocyang Jikeyng. Malix Soto qduriq Kngkawas 2019 idas 10 cida muda Soto seyngkyo ka Bolivia, ana so wada mbiyax mangal seyngkyo ka Juan Evo Morales Ayma u, binaw wAada hliyan mqbling seyngkyo Hantay Pay ka hiya, kiya mi splawa dha malax Soto; bukuy daw muda mkelu swey, iyax cida u niqan 3 hiyi sediq wada mhuqil mi mkkbkuy hiyi wada mangal luqah. Juan Evo Morales Ayma snturung knbeyhing bay hantay swey ukla kari muda mntxal snburah seyngkyo dungan, binaw ucwang butay mi keysacu chuykwan u ptura lmawa Juan Evo Morales Ayma malax Soto; idas 11 diyax 10 cida, Juan Evo Morales Ayma u pkla kari malax Soto, bukuy daw qduriq Mexico mi Argentina tuling qnlqilan. Iyax niyi cida, Juan Evo Morales Ayma u lmawa mpdkuh niya spuda pusa hmtur elu muda Jiday Keming, bukuy daw heytay mi keysacu u snquri dmkuh Morales swey pnsliyan niya prading muda phuqil (kari Spain: masacres de Senkata y Sacaba 2019); quri so niyi, Bolivia Shwa pumn mi Rinji Seyhu u tmiyu Juan Evo Morales Ayma 'Prrudu Pspaux' mi Pstali Cuyi', kiya mi Tase Kwoci, Jncweyn Kwanca pa to smriq msang Rinji Seyhu dmuwi biyax singcng knhmuc dmudul quri Shwa, kiya mi pusa kari sbhiwan pbrxi ka Shwa. Pprngawan Wada qduriq qnlqilan qnlhangan nganguc ka Juan Evo Morales Ayma daw, Rinji Seyhu u muda tmraqil pusa 2 cumi Juan Evo Morales Ayma, ida wisu dan tyawca saya nina.Pusa Cumi Quri Prrudu Pspaux Qnlhangan Biyax Seyhu. Snquri hmili Snkuxul laqi na tyawca. Kngkawas 2020 idas 8, Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa wada hliyan alaw ngalan Soto Kngkawas 2020 idas 8 diyax 7, niqan hmrinas 4 ka sassing Juan Evo Morales Ayma tuhuy wouwa wada pqtan kana sediq. Spuda Spain singbung wangcan OK Diario ka singbung hokoku, Juan Evo Morales Ayma tuhuy wauwa kiya 'Pnsupu Pnluban Dha' u hmrinas 5 knkawas. OK Diario u muda pqita qnbsyaqan patas pnrngawan dha kari mi hnang pnrngawan ddha dha, kiya ka knkana pnrngawan dha quri uuda msupu taqi uri. Bolivia tangcyu ka muda pkla kari, taxa wauwa kiya pa 15 cida u wada mchdil, mniq kngkawas 2016 idas 2 (16 knkawas) cida u sptuting niya Juan Evo Morales Ayma 1laqi rabu qridin, wada so bnbur prngawan kari knkana ka Bolivia. Kngkawas 2020 idas 8 diyax 21 kingal nanaq Dungan snkuxul laqi tiping mi smliq qridin ang, wada pswaun Bolivia Shwabu bqanan cumi 'Smliq waya smliq qridin mi pbari sediq', kiya u spngan dha ka diyax niyi u ya bay mniq kngkawas 2015 ngalan Soto cida ka mnuda qnnaqah niyi. Malu pnrngawan kari Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa kha balay skxlun niya mtur boru, so kiya u wada msuputuhuy Bolivia Cyacu na Hwaens Tiyusng psdhu pbatas patas, kndadax kngkawas 2014Ôľćkngkawas 2015 cyoci malu tumal pnsung mtur boru, ngalan kcka iyax niya. Rmngaw kari ka mprngaw niya cyotuy, ou ddaun niya ka Soto, uka brahan tumal knkingal pnsung boru, kiya mi biyax niya u wana balay mpdhuq 20 pungkang. Soto u spuda tnualang hiya ttikuh bay snduwan hbangan muda smpu, knkana idas u sntuku 214 pila Amirika, rmngaw ka Hwaens Tiyusng Cusi: 'Skxlun bay Soto ka mtur boru, malu bay ka bntran niya boru uri, so kiya u 10 go posan ka plkusan niya, mnsupu tuy dha pa muda pkla Juan Evo Morales Ayma kana ka diyax pnsung mi uuda dha pnsung, Juan Evo Morales Ayma u hiya nanaq ka muda uwau, mptumal pnsung knuwan ka hiya.' Pnyahan pnatas Tnhjil kari seejiq Watan Diro mtabug.
S.PHON: = …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** ka …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan boli*ia ta sajaŇč o kija ka …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = soto = …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma pa kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u wada maŇčal **.** ńßjo mbijax maŇčal soto boli*ia, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijx ** psdńßuwan pńßiju soto, kndadax qnlńßaŇčan dńßa ptalax qnlńßaŇčan spain dńßuq ¶ida mwaja balaj tu* s…ôdiq tnpusu na mpdudul nija, kija u…ĺi u boli*ia tu* tuiwil pali ¶ na soto. mniq niji ¶ida ńßan u boli*ia na s…ô…üi mi k…ô…üaj pa ida wisu qlńßaŇčun bńßuwaj s…ôdiq spain na llutu ¶ mi aj…üoku s…ôdiq tnpusu mi s…ôdiq o ¶o ka dmuwi bijax, kija mi …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma pa uka da…ĺa o ¶o mi mnduŇčus baj s…ôdiq tnpusu ka ńßija. …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma u snp…ôjańß tuńßuna ¶ m…ô ¶o india s…ôdiq tnpusu na s…ôdiq ajma…ĺa ka ńßija, …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma pa pllukus koŇčńßu mi lukus s…ôdiq tnpusu ka ńßija, ini plukus s…ôbi…ĺo tumal kkluwanan pnslijan s…ô…üi ka ńßija. snp…ôjańß kŇčkawas **** wada sb…ĺańßun ka k…ôŇčpo daw, …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma pa wada maŇčal **.*% ńßto lmutu ¶ soto duŇčan. qmpańß soto ¶ida ka …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma u pk…ĺana pnluban dńßa ¶jokoku, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * dńßuq idas * dijax * mi kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** dńßuq idas * dijax ** mi kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** dńßuq dijax ** mn* ńßomuŇč ¶jokoku, kija u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** maŇčal bnuwaj pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ¶okoku …ünmin miŇčgi ńßakas…ô sw…ôw…ô. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ida, sntu…ĺuŇč s…ômuŇč ppanan skoki soto boli*ia po ¶jaŇč …üik…ôŇč. malix soto qdu…ĺiq kŇčkawas **** idas ** ¶ida muda soto s…ôŇčkjo ka boli*ia, ana so wada mbijax maŇčal s…ôŇčkjo ka …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma u, binaw waada ńßlijan mqbliŇč s…ôŇčkjo ńßantaj paj ka ńßija, kija mi splawa dńßa malax soto; bukuj daw muda mk…ôlu sw…ô, ijax ¶ida u niqan * ńßiji s…ôdiq wada mńßuqil mi mkkbkuj ńßiji wada maŇčal luqańß. …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma sntu…ĺuŇč knb…ôńßiŇč baj ńßantaj sw…ô ukla ka…ĺi muda mntxal snbu…ĺańß s…ôŇčkjo duŇčan, binaw u ¶waŇč butaj mi k…ôsa ¶u ¶ńßujkwan u ptu…ĺa lmawa …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma malax soto; idas ** dijax ** ¶ida, …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma u pkla ka…ĺi malax soto, bukuj daw qdu…ĺiq m…ôxi ¶o mi a…ĺg…ôntina tuliŇč qnlqilan. ijax niji ¶ida, …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma u lmawa mpdkuńß nija spuda pusa ńßmtu…ĺ …ôlu muda …üidaj k…ômiŇč, bukuj daw ńß…ôtaj mi k…ôsa ¶u u snqu…ĺi dmkuńß mo…ĺal…ôs sw…ô pnslijan nija p…ĺadiŇč muda pńßuqil (ka…ĺi spain: masa ¶…ĺ…ôs d…ô s…ônkata j sa ¶aba ****); qu…ĺi so niji, boli*ia sńßwa pumn mi …ĺin…üi s…ôńßu u tmiju …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma 'p…ĺ…ĺudu pspaux' mi pstali ¶uji', kija mi tas…ô kwo ¶i, …ün ¶w…ôn kwan ¶a pa to sm…ĺiq msaŇč …ĺin…üi s…ôńßu dmuwi bijax siŇč ¶Ňč knńßmu ¶ dmudul qu…ĺi sńßwa, kija mi pusa ka…ĺi sbńßiwan pb…ĺxi ka sńßwa. pp…ĺŇčawan wada qdu…ĺiq qnlqilan qnlńßaŇčan ŇčaŇču ¶ ka …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma daw, …ĺin…üi s…ôńßu u muda tm…ĺaqil pusa * ¶umi …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma, ida wisu dan tjaw ¶a saja nina.pusa ¶umi qu…ĺi p…ĺ…ĺudu pspaux qnlńßaŇčan bijax s…ôńßu. snqu…ĺi ńßmili snkuxul laqi na tjaw ¶a. kŇčkawas **** idas *, …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma pa wada ńßlijan alaw Ňčalan soto kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, niqan ńßm…ĺinas * ka sassiŇč …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma tuńßuj wouwa wada pqtan kana s…ôdiq. spuda spain siŇčbuŇč waŇč ¶an ok dia…ĺio ka siŇčbuŇč ńßokoku, …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma tuńßuj wauwa kija 'pnsupu pnluban dńßa' u ńßm…ĺinas * knkawas. ok dia…ĺio u muda pqita qnbsjaqan patas pn…ĺŇčawan dńßa ka…ĺi mi ńßnaŇč pn…ĺŇčawan ddńßa dńßa, kija ka knkana pn…ĺŇčawan dńßa qu…ĺi uuda msupu taqi u…ĺi. boli*ia taŇč ¶ju ka muda pkla ka…ĺi, taxa wauwa kija pa ** ¶ida u wada m ¶ńßdil, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * (** knkawas) ¶ida u sptutiŇč nija …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma *laqi …ĺabu q…ĺidin, wada so bnbu…ĺ p…ĺŇčawan ka…ĺi knkana ka boli*ia. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** kiŇčal nanaq duŇčan snkuxul laqi tipiŇč mi smliq q…ĺidin aŇč, wada pswaun boli*ia sńßwabu bqanan ¶umi 'smliq waja smliq q…ĺidin mi pba…ĺi s…ôdiq', kija u spŇčan dńßa ka dijax niji u ja baj mniq kŇčkawas **** Ňčalan soto ¶ida ka mnuda qnnaqańß niji. malu pn…ĺŇčawan ka…ĺi …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma pa kńßa balaj skxlun nija mtu…ĺ bo…ĺu, so kija u wada msuputuńßuj boli*ia ¶ja ¶u na ńßwa…ôns tijusŇč psdńßu pbatas patas, kndadax kŇčkawas *****kŇčkawas **** ¶jo ¶i malu tumal pnsuŇč mtu…ĺ bo…ĺu, Ňčalan k ¶ka ijax nija. …ĺmŇčaw ka…ĺi ka mp…ĺŇčaw nija ¶jotuj, ou ddaun nija ka soto, uka b…ĺańßan tumal knkiŇčal pnsuŇč bo…ĺu, kija mi bijax nija u wana balaj mpdńßuq ** puŇčkaŇč. soto u spuda tnualaŇč ńßija ttikuńß baj snduwan ńßbaŇčan muda smpu, knkana idas u sntuku *** pila ami…ĺika, …ĺmŇčaw ka ńßwa…ôns tijusŇč ¶usi: 'skxlun baj soto ka mtu…ĺ bo…ĺu, malu baj ka bnt…ĺan nija bo…ĺu u…ĺi, so kija u ** go posan ka plkusan nija, mnsupu tuj dńßa pa muda pkla …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma kana ka dijax pnsuŇč mi uuda dńßa pnsuŇč, …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma u ńßija nanaq ka muda uwau, mptumal pnsuŇč knuwan ka ńßija.' pnjańßan pnatas tnńß…üil ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq watan di…ĺo mtabug.
S.FORM: = Evo Morales = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 10 jiyax 26 ka Evo Morales ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bolivia ta sayang o kiya ka Evo Morales, pnaah hngkawas 2006 idas 1 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Soto = Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa kngkawas 2005 cida u wada mangal 53.7ÔľÖ hyo mbiyax mangal Soto Bolivia, mniq kngkawas 2006 idas 1 diyx 22 psdhuwan phiyu Soto, kndadax qnlhangan dha ptalax qnlhangan Spain dhuq cida mwaya balay tu1 Sediq Tnpusu na mpdudul niya, kiya uri u Bolivia tu1 Tuiwil Palic na Soto. Mniq niyi cida han u Bolivia na seyji mi keyjay pa ida wisu qlhangun bhuway sediq Spain na llutuc mi ayjoku Sediq Tnpusu mi sediq Oco ka dmuwi biyax, kiya mi Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa uka dara Oco mi mndungus bay Sediq Tnpusu ka hiya. Juan Evo Morales Ayma u snpeyyah Tuhunac Meyco India Sediq Tnpusu na sediq Aymara ka hiya, Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa pllukus konghu mi lukus Sediq Tnpusu ka hiya, ini plukus seybiro tumal kkluwanan pnsliyan seyji ka hiya. Snpeyyah kngkawas 2009 wada sbrahun ka keyngpo daw, Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa wada mangal 64.2% hto lmutuc Soto dungan. Qmpah Soto cida ka Juan Evo Morales Ayma u pkrana pnluban dha Cyokoku, mniq kngkawas 2006 idas 1 diyax 8 dhuq idas 1 diyax 9 mi kngkawas 2011 idas 8 diyax 10 dhuq idas 8 diyax 13 mi kngkawas 2018 idas 6 diyax 18 dhuq diyax 19 mn3 homung Cyokoku, kiya u mniq kngkawas 2011 idas 8 diyax 11 mangal bnuway Pyasan Tubeyhing Cokoku Jnmin Minggi Hakasey Sweywey. Kngkawas 2013 idas 7 diyax 2 cida, snturung Seymung Ppanan Skoki Soto Bolivia Pocyang Jikeyng. Malix Soto qduriq Kngkawas 2019 idas 10 cida muda Soto seyngkyo ka Bolivia, ana so wada mbiyax mangal seyngkyo ka Juan Evo Morales Ayma u, binaw wAada hliyan mqbling seyngkyo Hantay Pay ka hiya, kiya mi splawa dha malax Soto; bukuy daw muda mkelu swey, iyax cida u niqan 3 hiyi sediq wada mhuqil mi mkkbkuy hiyi wada mangal luqah. Juan Evo Morales Ayma snturung knbeyhing bay hantay swey ukla kari muda mntxal snburah seyngkyo dungan, binaw ucwang butay mi keysacu chuykwan u ptura lmawa Juan Evo Morales Ayma malax Soto; idas 11 diyax 10 cida, Juan Evo Morales Ayma u pkla kari malax Soto, bukuy daw qduriq Mexico mi Argentina tuling qnlqilan. Iyax niyi cida, Juan Evo Morales Ayma u lmawa mpdkuh niya spuda pusa hmtur elu muda Jiday Keming, bukuy daw heytay mi keysacu u snquri dmkuh Morales swey pnsliyan niya prading muda phuqil (kari Spain: masacres de Senkata y Sacaba 2019); quri so niyi, Bolivia Shwa pumn mi Rinji Seyhu u tmiyu Juan Evo Morales Ayma 'Prrudu Pspaux' mi Pstali Cuyi', kiya mi Tase Kwoci, Jncweyn Kwanca pa to smriq msang Rinji Seyhu dmuwi biyax singcng knhmuc dmudul quri Shwa, kiya mi pusa kari sbhiwan pbrxi ka Shwa. Pprngawan Wada qduriq qnlqilan qnlhangan nganguc ka Juan Evo Morales Ayma daw, Rinji Seyhu u muda tmraqil pusa 2 cumi Juan Evo Morales Ayma, ida wisu dan tyawca saya nina.Pusa Cumi Quri Prrudu Pspaux Qnlhangan Biyax Seyhu. Snquri hmili Snkuxul laqi na tyawca. Kngkawas 2020 idas 8, Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa wada hliyan alaw ngalan Soto Kngkawas 2020 idas 8 diyax 7, niqan hmrinas 4 ka sassing Juan Evo Morales Ayma tuhuy wouwa wada pqtan kana sediq. Spuda Spain singbung wangcan OK Diario ka singbung hokoku, Juan Evo Morales Ayma tuhuy wauwa kiya 'Pnsupu Pnluban Dha' u hmrinas 5 knkawas. OK Diario u muda pqita qnbsyaqan patas pnrngawan dha kari mi hnang pnrngawan ddha dha, kiya ka knkana pnrngawan dha quri uuda msupu taqi uri. Bolivia tangcyu ka muda pkla kari, taxa wauwa kiya pa 15 cida u wada mchdil, mniq kngkawas 2016 idas 2 (16 knkawas) cida u sptuting niya Juan Evo Morales Ayma 1laqi rabu qridin, wada so bnbur prngawan kari knkana ka Bolivia. Kngkawas 2020 idas 8 diyax 21 kingal nanaq Dungan snkuxul laqi tiping mi smliq qridin ang, wada pswaun Bolivia Shwabu bqanan cumi 'Smliq waya smliq qridin mi pbari sediq', kiya u spngan dha ka diyax niyi u ya bay mniq kngkawas 2015 ngalan Soto cida ka mnuda qnnaqah niyi. Malu pnrngawan kari Juan Evo Morales Ayma pa kha balay skxlun niya mtur boru, so kiya u wada msuputuhuy Bolivia Cyacu na Hwaens Tiyusng psdhu pbatas patas, kndadax kngkawas 2014Ôľćkngkawas 2015 cyoci malu tumal pnsung mtur boru, ngalan kcka iyax niya. Rmngaw kari ka mprngaw niya cyotuy, ou ddaun niya ka Soto, uka brahan tumal knkingal pnsung boru, kiya mi biyax niya u wana balay mpdhuq 20 pungkang. Soto u spuda tnualang hiya ttikuh bay snduwan hbangan muda smpu, knkana idas u sntuku 214 pila Amirika, rmngaw ka Hwaens Tiyusng Cusi: 'Skxlun bay Soto ka mtur boru, malu bay ka bntran niya boru uri, so kiya u 10 go posan ka plkusan niya, mnsupu tuy dha pa muda pkla Juan Evo Morales Ayma kana ka diyax pnsung mi uuda dha pnsung, Juan Evo Morales Ayma u hiya nanaq ka muda uwau, mptumal pnsung knuwan ka hiya.' Pnyahan pnatas Tnhjil kari seejiq Watan Diro mtabug.

soto ¶ida ka …üuan …ô*o mo…ĺal…ôs ajma u pk…ĺana pnluban dńßa ¶jokoku, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * dńßuq idas * dijax * mi kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** dńßuq idas * dijax ** mi kŇčkawas ****
